name: Upside Down
method: Build into ice-filled glass, stir gently.

name: Defatigante
method: Build into ice-filled glass, stir gently.

name: Pink Gin
garnish: A wide strip of lemon peel
method: Coat the glass: Dash the Angostura bitters into an empty, chilled cocktail glass. Swirl the bitters around to coat the inside completely, then discard any excess liquid. Stir the spirit: In a separate mixing glass filled with ice, combine the gin and water. Stir for about 30 seconds until freezing cold.Strain: Strain the chilled gin into your bitters-coated glass.Express: Twist the lemon peel over the top to release its citrus oils, then drop it in
